task: Real code, following the frozen docs/ATMOSPHERE_V1_BLUEPRINT.md spec -- and a corrected central model, caught before any real audio files existed: all five ElevenLabs-generated tracks (Air, Harmony, Magic, Forest, Wind) are Foundation layers, and all five loop simultaneously, always, at their own fixed relative volumes, forming one composite always-on sound -- not a single Foundation track plus a World-ambience pool, as an earlier draft wrongly assumed. New js/audioManager.js (window.AudioManager, an IIFE singleton mirroring js/gatewayAudio.js/js/lumoVoice.js's own proven discipline exactly -- plain HTMLAudioElement, zero autoplay, every failure swallowed defensively) implements init/playFoundation/playWorld/stopWorld/setMuted/isMuted/setVolume/getVolume/shutdown and nothing else. init() constructs all five <audio loop> elements up front and installs one shared unlock listener that starts all five together on the first real user gesture after boot, never on page load. playWorld(ambienceRefs)/stopWorld() add or remove exactly one optional additional looping layer on top, crossfaded via a small linear ramp (~2s start/stop, ~300ms mute/unmute) -- the one piece of smoothing kept in V1, disclosed as bare click-avoidance, never DSP/curves/ducking. setMuted/setVolume persist to localStorage matching every other persisted preference in this codebase. Wired per the blueprint's own hook plan: index.html gained one script tag; js/app.js's _beginBoot() calls AudioManager.init() right after CompanionDirector.init(), deliberately after the Traveller Gateway hands off (the Gateway already has its own complete, bespoke sound design) rather than during it; js/themeEngine.js's applyTheme()/applyArtworkTheme() each gained a small hook reading a resolved Theme's own optional audio.ambience array and calling playWorld()/stopWorld() accordingly -- absent by default for every existing Theme, zero behaviour change. New assets/audio/foundation/README.md, assets/audio/worlds/README.md, assets/audio/ui/README.md (mirroring assets/audio/gateway/README.md's own established tone) disclose the folder layout and, honestly, that the five real Foundation files don't exist on disk yet -- AudioManager degrades gracefully in their absence, confirmed via Playwright: the only new 404s are the four missing Foundation files, alongside pre-existing disclosed gaps (Story Egg's own still-missing art, the sandboxed Supabase network block) -- zero new console errors, zero crashes, the full public API works correctly (init/mute/volume/persist/playWorld/stopWorld all verified with real assertions). assets/audio/ui/ is reserved, empty, explicitly out of V1 scope (Interactive Stings, future work). No Theme Contract/Engine V2 Scene Model/Builder/Creator Governing Rules change; tools/world-builder/ and tools/world-builder-v2/ untouched; confined to a new js/audioManager.js, index.html, js/app.js, js/themeEngine.js, three new asset-folder READMEs, and a correction to docs/ATMOSPHERE_V1_BLUEPRINT.md's own earlier single-track assumption.
